description_long: This object is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a lioness, featuring a light tan body with subtle shading and a long, slender tail. The head is rounded with a short snout, small rounded ears, and a neutral facial expression, with stitched details for the nose and mouth. The legs are proportionate and slightly bent, giving the toy a lifelike stance. The surface appears soft and fuzzy, typical of plush toys, and the seams are visible along the body and limbs. The toy is free of any visible clothing or accessories, maintaining a simple and realistic animal appearance. Its size and construction suggest it is lightweight and easy to carry, suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments.
description: A soft, tan plush lioness stuffed toy with a realistic animal shape, stitched facial features, and a long tail. The surface is fuzzy and the toy is lightweight and simple, with no accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the lioness's face, rounded ears, and front legs, with stitched nose and mouth details visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, slender legs, and long tail, with the head in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and tail, with both hind legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the body, legs, and tail, with the head in profile facing right.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with stitched eyes and a small, closed mouth. The features are calm and gentle, giving the toy a serene appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the head facing forward and the tail extended behind. The limbs are slightly bent, giving a natural, lifelike stance.
